description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a perforated handguard and a prominent receiver section. The stock and pistol grip are made of wood, contrasting with the predominantly matte black metal body. A drum magazine is attached beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity feeding system. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, with the front sight post and rear notch both visible. The muzzle is simple, lacking any complex device, and the overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms. The construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and wood materials for durability and ergonomic handling.
description: A long, black metal rifle with a wooden stock and grip, featuring a drum magazine and iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a perforated handguard and simple muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, pistol grip, and the attached drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular profile of the drum magazine, the barrel's end, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, grip, and the full length of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock, the drum magazine's side, and the rear sight alignment.
